  "description": "Rayfield Medical Services Limited is a healthcare provider located in Jos, Plateau State, Nigeria. We are committed to delivering quality medical care through a team of qualified professionals and modern facilities across various clinical and support departments.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Officer
Job Location: Jos, Plateau
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Schedule: Shift duty

Role Summary


	Front desk and customer service operations, patient administration and service coordination.


Qualifications &amp; Skills


	HND/Bachelor&rsquo;s degree, minimum 3 years relevant post-NYSC experience
	Proficiency in computer applications is essential.


Compensation


	Compensation is competitive and commensurate with qualifications and experience. Performance-based incentives may apply, depending on the role.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their Cover Letter and CV via email to: adminrms@rayfieldmedical.com.ng using &ldquo;Front Desk Officer&rdquo; as the subject of the email.

Alternatively, Hard copies can be submitted to:
Rayfield Medical Services Limited,
No. 30 Raphael Davou Street,
Fwavwei Rayfield,
Jos, Plateau State.",

Front Desk Officer Job at Rayfield Medical Services Limited




        
    

        
        Rayfield Medical Services Limited is a healthcare provider located in Jos, Plateau State, Nigeria. We are committed to delivering quality medical care through a team of qualified professionals and modern facilities across various clinical and support departments.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Front Desk Officer
Job Location: Jos, Plateau
Employment Type: Full-time
Work Schedule: Shift duty

Role Summary


	Front desk and customer service operations, patient administration and service coordination.


Qualifications & Skills
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	HND/Bachelor’s degree, minimum 3 years relevant post-NYSC experience
	Proficiency in computer applications is essential.


Compensation


	Compensation is competitive and commensurate with qualifications and experience. Performance-based incentives may apply, depending on the role.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their Cover Letter and CV via email to: [email protected] using “Front Desk Officer” as the subject of the email.

Alternatively, Hard copies can be submitted to:
Rayfield Medical Services Limited,
No. 30 Raphael Davou Street,
Fwavwei Rayfield,
Jos, Plateau State.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Technical Procurement Engineer – Mechanical & Industrial Materials",
  "description": "Petromech is a Kaduna-based company in Nigeria specializing in waste management, with a primary focus on producing base oils and engine oils from used lubricants. The company also operates a 2,500 m&sup2; workshop equipped to handle a wide range of mechanical maintenance, repair, and fabrication services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Technical Procurement Engineer &ndash; Mechanical &amp; Industrial Materials

Job Location: Kaduna

Job Description


	We are looking for an experienced Technical Procurement Engineer to support and lead our procurement activities for our mechanical workshop, fabrication operations, waste oil recycling plant, base oil production facility, and lubricant manufacturing operations.
	This is not a general procurement position. The ideal candidate must have strong technical knowledge of mechanical, industrial, workshop, fabrication, plant, and production materials. The successful candidate will be responsible for understanding material requirements, identifying the correct products, coordinating with suppliers, and guiding the procurement team to ensure that the right materials are purchased on time and according to technical specifications.
	The role requires a candidate who can understand technical requirements, review product specifications, communicate with suppliers, compare quotations, and prevent incorrect or unsuitable purchases.


Key Responsibilities


	Review material requests from workshop, production, maintenance, laboratory, and project teams.
	Identify the correct technical specifications of required materials, equipment, spare parts, and consumables.
	Guide and support the procurement team in sourcing accurate and suitable products.
	Communicate with local and international suppliers to obtain quotations, technical details, datasheets, and availability information.
	Compare supplier offers from both technical and commercial perspectives.
	Ensure that purchased materials match the required specifications, drawings, datasheets, or operational needs.
	Source mechanical, industrial, fabrication, workshop, plant, and production-related materials.
	Support procurement for items such as steel materials, pipes, fittings, valves, flanges, pumps, motors, bearings, welding consumables, CNC/plasma consumables, hydraulic and pneumatic components, laboratory-related technical items, and plant spare parts.
	Coordinate with engineers, workshop supervisors, production teams, and management to clarify technical requirements.
	Prevent wrong purchases by verifying product suitability before ordering.
	Maintain proper procurement records, supplier lists, quotations, and technical comparison sheets.
	Research new suppliers and alternative sources in Nigeria and abroad when required.
	Follow up on delivery timelines and ensure materials are supplied on time.


Required Qualifications &amp; Experience


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Mechanical Engineering or a related technical field.
	5&ndash;7 years of experience in technical procurement, industrial procurement, mechanical procurement, or engineering-based purchasing roles.
	Strong knowledge of mechanical, fabrication, workshop, and industrial plant materials.
	Experience in mechanical workshops, fabrication companies, oil &amp; gas, manufacturing plants, lubricant production, waste oil recycling, heavy industry, or similar sectors is highly preferred.
	Ability to read and understand technical specifications, datasheets, drawings, material lists, and equipment requirements.
	Good understanding of mechanical spare parts, industrial consumables, and production materials.
	Ability to identify the difference between correct and incorrect materials based on technical requirements.
	Strong supplier communication and negotiation skills.
	Ability to prepare quotation comparisons and procurement reports.
	Strong research skills and ability to find reliable suppliers for uncommon or technical items.
	Good knowledge of MS Office, especially Excel, for procurement tracking and comparison tables.
	Highly organized, detail-oriented, proactive, and solution-focused.


Preferred Skills:


	Experience sourcing materials both locally in Nigeria and internationally.
	Knowledge of import procedures, logistics, and delivery follow-up is an advantage.
	Experience working with fabrication workshops or industrial production plants.
	Strong technical judgment and practical field understanding.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet urgent material requirements.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: nilufer.aydin@petro-mech.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the next stage of the recruitment process.",

Technical Procurement Engineer – Mechanical & Industrial Materials Job at Petromech




        
    

        
        Petromech is a Kaduna-based company in Nigeria specializing in waste management, with a primary focus on producing base oils and engine oils from used lubricants. The company also operates a 2,500 m² workshop equipped to handle a wide range of mechanical maintenance, repair, and fabrication services.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Technical Procurement Engineer – Mechanical & Industrial Materials

Job Location: Kaduna

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for an experienced Technical Procurement Engineer to support and lead our procurement activities for our mechanical workshop, fabrication operations, waste oil recycling plant, base oil production facility, and lubricant manufacturing operations.
	This is not a general procurement position. The ideal candidate must have strong technical knowledge of mechanical, industrial, workshop, fabrication, plant, and production materials. The successful candidate will be responsible for understanding material requirements, identifying the correct products, coordinating with suppliers, and guiding the procurement team to ensure that the right materials are purchased on time and according to technical specifications.
	The role requires a candidate who can understand technical requirements, review product specifications, communicate with suppliers, compare quotations, and prevent incorrect or unsuitable purchases.


Key Responsibilities


	Review material requests from workshop, production, maintenance, laboratory, and project teams.
	Identify the correct technical specifications of required materials, equipment, spare parts, and consumables.
	Guide and support the procurement team in sourcing accurate and suitable products.
	Communicate with local and international suppliers to obtain quotations, technical details, datasheets, and availability information.
	Compare supplier offers from both technical and commercial perspectives.
	Ensure that purchased materials match the required specifications, drawings, datasheets, or operational needs.
	Source mechanical, industrial, fabrication, workshop, plant, and production-related materials.
	Support procurement for items such as steel materials, pipes, fittings, valves, flanges, pumps, motors, bearings, welding consumables, CNC/plasma consumables, hydraulic and pneumatic components, laboratory-related technical items, and plant spare parts.
	Coordinate with engineers, workshop supervisors, production teams, and management to clarify technical requirements.
	Prevent wrong purchases by verifying product suitability before ordering.
	Maintain proper procurement records, supplier lists, quotations, and technical comparison sheets.
	Research new suppliers and alternative sources in Nigeria and abroad when required.
	Follow up on delivery timelines and ensure materials are supplied on time.


Required Qualifications & Experience


	Bachelor’s Degree in Mechanical Engineering or a related technical field.
	5–7 years of experience in technical procurement, industrial procurement, mechanical procurement, or engineering-based purchasing roles.
	Strong knowledge of mechanical, fabrication, workshop, and industrial plant materials.
	Experience in mechanical workshops, fabrication companies, oil & gas, manufacturing plants, lubricant production, waste oil recycling, heavy industry, or similar sectors is highly preferred.
	Ability to read and understand technical specifications, datasheets, drawings, material lists, and equipment requirements.
	Good understanding of mechanical spare parts, industrial consumables, and production materials.
	Ability to identify the difference between correct and incorrect materials based on technical requirements.
	Strong supplier communication and negotiation skills.
	Ability to prepare quotation comparisons and procurement reports.
	Strong research skills and ability to find reliable suppliers for uncommon or technical items.
	Good knowledge of MS Office, especially Excel, for procurement tracking and comparison tables.
	Highly organized, detail-oriented, proactive, and solution-focused.


Preferred Skills:


	Experience sourcing materials both locally in Nigeria and internationally.
	Knowledge of import procedures, logistics, and delivery follow-up is an advantage.
	Experience working with fabrication workshops or industrial production plants.
	Strong technical judgment and practical field understanding.
	Ability to work under pressure and meet urgent material requirements.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the next stage of the recruitment process.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary


	Patient care across all patient category, including assessment, treatment and monitoring of patients, medication administration, collaboration with the healthcare team, maintaining accurate records &amp; adherence to healthcare standards.


Qualifications &amp; Skills


	Degree in Nursing from a recognized institution
	Minimum of 3 years of post-NYSC clinical experience
	Current registration and practicing license with the Nursing and Midwifery Council of Nigeria (NMCN)
	Strong communication, empathy, and teamwork skills
	Proficiency in computer applications is essential.


Remuneration


	Compensation is competitive and commensurate with qualifications and experience. Performance-based incentives May apply


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their Cover Letter and CV via email to: adminrms@rayfieldmedical.com.ng using &quot;Registered Nurse&quot;as the subject of the email.

Registered Nurse Job at Rayfield Medical Services Limited




        
    

        
        Rayfield Medical Services Limited is a healthcare provider located in Jos, Plateau State, Nigeria. We are committed to delivering quality medical care through a team of qualified professionals and modern facilities across various clinical and support departments.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Registered Nurse
Job Location: Jos, Plateau
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Patient care across all patient category, including assessment, treatment and monitoring of patients, medication administration, collaboration with the healthcare team, maintaining accurate records & adherence to healthcare standards.


Qualifications & Skills


	Degree in Nursing from a recognized institution
	Minimum of 3 years of post-NYSC clinical experience
	Current registration and practicing license with the Nursing and Midwifery Council of Nigeria (NMCN)
	Strong communication, empathy, and teamwork skills
	Proficiency in computer applications is essential.


Remuneration


	Compensation is competitive and commensurate with qualifications and experience. Performance-based incentives May apply


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their Cover Letter and CV via email to: [email protected] using "Registered Nurse"as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Bookkeeping Recorder",
  "description": "LEAM Consulting Limited, a recruiting agency with years of professional experience, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Bookkeeping Recorder

Job Location: Molete, Ibadan - Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Record day to day financial transactions and complete the posting process
	Verify that transactions are recorded in the correct day book, suppliers ledger, customer ledger and general ledger
	Maintain daily records and give report
	Process invoice in a timely manner


Requirements


	Minimum of SSCE / OND qualification
	Good Data entry skills
	Customer service orientation and negotiation skills.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hiring@leamconsulting.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: For more enquries, Whatsapp, 09047710414.",

Bookkeeping Recorder Job at LEAM Consulting Limited




        
    

        
        LEAM Consulting Limited, a recruiting agency with years of professional experience, is recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Bookkeeping Recorder

Job Location: Molete, Ibadan - Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Record day to day financial transactions and complete the posting process
	Verify that transactions are recorded in the correct day book, suppliers ledger, customer ledger and general ledger
	Maintain daily records and give report
	Process invoice in a timely manner


Requirements
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Minimum of SSCE / OND qualification
	Good Data entry skills
	Customer service orientation and negotiation skills.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: For more enquries, Whatsapp, 09047710414.    

    

        Click here to Apply
